title: Flavorful Smoky Dutch Chicken Skewers
description: A smoky and flavorful Dutch dish featuring dried chillies, perfect for a crowd, and kosher-friendly. This recipe is made on a slate-tile vessel for a unique presentation.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and crushed dried chillies.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the preheated slate-tile vessel and grill for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
After 5 minutes of grilling, blanch the chicken with a little water to prevent burning.
Once the chicken is cooked through, remove from the grill and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, straight from the slate-tile vessel.
